problem id: 8610c227
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) XOR SHL(5)

examples:
  10101101 -> 01110110
  00111110 -> 11011111
  11011100 -> 11101110
  11001101 -> 01000110
  00111100 -> 10011110
  01001110 -> 11100111
  10101001 -> 11110100
  00010100 -> 10001010

query: 11100001
predicted answer: 11010000
